economic_notes: South Beach Casino Limited Partnership and Pauingassi First Nation Construction Inc. accounted for by modified equity method. South Beach Casino income distribution of $211,832 received in prior year (2021). Gas Bar & Store fully consolidated.
notes: Fiscal year ended March 31, 2022. Six entities fully consolidated including Housing Authority, Care Home, Educational Authority, Health Authority, Gas Bar & Store and Operating Fund. Two GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: South Beach Casino Limited Partnership and Pauingassi First Nation Construction Inc. Net debt position of $904,541. No schedule of remuneration included in the provided financial statements. Training and employment segment shows a deficit of $18,277. Prior year (2021) included large FNIH Health Centre Project funding directed to Shawano Consulting of $4,982,950 which inflated prior year revenue significantly.
